channel.title: SpeakForWater
channel.description: Making water resources research accessible to everyone. Join Anna and Ehsan as they discuss the latest open-access papers on hydrology, flood management, remote sensing, and water engineering — explained in plain language for farmers, water managers, and anyone who cares about water.
channel.itunes:author: Ehsan Kahrizi

item.title: Ep 12: Modeling surface water and groundwater mixing and mixing-dependent denitrification with bedform dynamics
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 12: Modeling surface water and groundwater mixing and mixing-dependent denitrification with bedform dynamics. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1221/2026/hess-30-1221-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 11: Synergistic impact of simultaneously assimilating radar- and radiometer-based soil moisture retrievals on the performance of numerical weather prediction systems
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 11: Synergistic impact of simultaneously assimilating radar- and radiometer-based soil moisture retrievals on the performance of numerical weather prediction systems. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1261/2026/hess-30-1261-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 10: River intermittency: mapping and upscaling of water occurrence using unmanned aerial vehicle, Random Forest and remote sensing landscape attributes
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 10: River intermittency: mapping and upscaling of water occurrence using unmanned aerial vehicle, Random Forest and remote sensing landscape attributes. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://doi.org/10.5194/hess-30-849-2026

item.title: Ep 9: Mapping key soil micronutrients across the Tibetan Plateau
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 9: Mapping key soil micronutrients across the Tibetan Plateau. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://essd.copernicus.org/articles/18/1561/2026/essd-18-1561-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 8: Encounter-state over-anchoring governs productive PETase binding on PET surfaces
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 8: Encounter-state over-anchoring governs productive PETase binding on PET surfaces. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/biorxiv/early/2026/03/18/2026.03.17.712535.full.pdf

item.title: Ep 7: Synaptic dynamics as a tunable substrate shaping neuronal activity sequences
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 7: Synaptic dynamics as a tunable substrate shaping neuronal activity sequences. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/biorxiv/early/2026/03/23/2026.03.22.713064.full.pdf

item.title: Ep 6: Assessing the impact of nature-based solutions on soil health in sub-Saharan Africa through farmer-centred methods
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 6: Assessing the impact of nature-based solutions on soil health in sub-Saharan Africa through farmer-centred methods. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://doi.org/10.1088/1748-9326/ae3975

item.title: Ep 5: RAPSODI: radiosonde atmospheric profiles from ship and island platforms during ORCESTRA, collected to Decipher the ITCZ
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 5: RAPSODI: radiosonde atmospheric profiles from ship and island platforms during ORCESTRA, collected to Decipher the ITCZ. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://essd.copernicus.org/articles/18/1833/2026/essd-18-1833-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 4: Performance Evaluation and Application of TOC-CRDS for Various Stable Carbon Isotope Analyses in Groundwater
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 4: Performance Evaluation and Application of TOC-CRDS for Various Stable Carbon Isotope Analyses in Groundwater. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/7/783/pdf?version=1774521012

item.title: Ep 3: Effects of Polymer-Based Soil Conditioner and Humic Acid on Soil Properties and Cotton Yield in Saline–Sodic Soils
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 3: Effects of Polymer-Based Soil Conditioner and Humic Acid on Soil Properties and Cotton Yield in Saline–Sodic Soils. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/7/780/pdf?version=1774514739

item.title: Ep 2: Mangrove Ecosystems: Importance, Threats and Opportunities for Restoration

SpeakForWater Episode 2: Mangrove Ecosystems: Importance, Threats and Opportunities for Restoration. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/7/787/pdf?version=1774523369

item.title: Ep 1: Innovations in the Revised FAO56 Guidelines for Computing Crop Water Requirements: Data, Calculation Methods, Irrigation, and Climate Change Challenges
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 1: Innovations in the Revised FAO56 Guidelines for Computing Crop Water Requirements: Data, Calculation Methods, Irrigation, and Climate Change Challenges. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://doi.org/10.3390/w18070793
